title: limited stand-alone functionality backstop for Loss of connection to companion client

messages.author: jbflotsam
messages.text: Wondering how much of an undertaking it may be to create a companion+backup firmware version incorporating a simple ui for limited functionality when the client -companion connection is broken due to dead battery etc. Use case would be ability to read recent messages and send pre-configured canned messages with use of simple rotary encoder/push button and a few tactile buttons if needed, small cheap oled screen. Perhaps some telemetry type info to go along with canned message. I'm thinking of use case when hiking or other activity and client companion connection is broken, ability to send status messages over mesh network would be nice. I'd like to be able to implement it on a faketec style cheap nrf build. I'm an engineer but this is far from my field so excuse any misnomers or incorrect terminology.
messages.content_html: Wondering how much of an undertaking it may be to create a companion+backup firmware version incorporating a simple ui for limited functionality when the client -companion connection is broken due to dead battery etc. Use case would be ability to read recent messages and send pre-configured canned messages with use of simple rotary encoder/push button and a few tactile buttons if needed, small cheap oled screen. Perhaps some telemetry type info to go along with canned message. I'm thinking of use case when hiking or other activity and client companion connection is broken, ability to send status messages over mesh network would be nice. I'd like to be able to implement it on a faketec style cheap nrf build. I'm an engineer but this is far from my field so excuse any misnomers or incorrect terminology.

messages.author: ded (SalishMesh)
messages.text: This could be considered partly implemented. Not the canned messages yet. But you can read messages from the display and send an advert with a button press which can include position information.
messages.content_html: This could be considered partly implemented. Not the canned messages yet. But you can read messages from the display and send an advert with a button press which can include position information.
messages.reactions_html: 1
